---
title: "test_bridge_direct.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/tests/test_bridge_direct.py"
loc: 21
complexity: 2
logic_score: 7.72
style_score: 4.00
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 4.60
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating test.

## Interaction Protocol
Import test and call its primary methods.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 7.7/10
- **Style [S]**: 4.0/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 4 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [asyncio](file://asyncio)
- [json](file://json)

### Exports
- `test`
